content:
What are the Top Innovation Grants in Alberta?

{/* Alberta Innovates */}
Alberta Innovates - Provincial Innovation Agency
Up to $5M
Applied Research
Multiple Streams

Alberta's primary innovation agency providing comprehensive funding, facilities access, and partnership support for technology development, applied research, and commercialization across all innovation stages.

Core Programs:
  • • Voucher Program (applied research)
  • • Accelerator initiatives
  • • Ecosystem development grants
  • • Infrastructure access programs
Support Features:
  • • Technology validation funding
  • • Access to world-class facilities
  • • Industry partnership facilitation
  • • Technical expertise and mentorship
{/* Emissions Reduction Alberta */}
Emissions Reduction Alberta (ERA)
Up to $25M
CleanTech Focus
Non-Repayable

Leading cleantech funding agency supporting technology development and deployment for emissions reduction, clean energy, carbon capture, hydrogen, and environmental innovation projects.

Technology Focus:
  • • Carbon capture utilization & storage
  • • Hydrogen production & applications
  • • Methane emission reduction
  • • Clean energy generation
Program Types:
  • • Grand Challenges (large-scale demo)
  • • Natural Gas Challenge
  • • Energy Savings for Business
  • • Technology development projects
{/* AI4Society */}
AI4Society - Alberta Machine Intelligence Institute (Amii)
Up to $500K
AI & ML
Collaborative

World-leading AI research institute providing funding, expertise, and partnership opportunities for companies applying artificial intelligence and machine learning to real-world problems.

AI Applications:
  • • Reinforcement learning solutions
  • • Machine learning deployment
  • • AI for energy & resources
  • • Healthcare AI applications
Support Included:
  • • AI expertise and consultation
  • • Research collaboration
  • • Talent access and training
  • • Technology commercialization
{/* Health Innovation */}
Alberta Health Services Innovation Fund & Health Innovation
Up to $2M
Health Tech
Clinical Focus

Health innovation funding supporting medical devices, digital health, clinical technologies, and healthcare solutions improving patient outcomes and healthcare system efficiency.

Innovation Areas:
  • • Digital health & telemedicine
  • • Medical device innovation
  • • Clinical decision support systems
  • • Patient monitoring technology
Program Features:
  • • Clinical validation support
  • • Healthcare system access
  • • Pilot implementation funding
  • • Commercialization pathways
shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Alberta innovation grants and funding programs. Access $950M+ through Alberta Innovates, Emissions Reduction Alberta, AI4Society, and energy transition, AI, health innovation. Funding available: up to $950M+.
shortAnswerQuestion: What innovation and technology grants are available in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Alberta Innovation Grants & Funding  | + Energy Transition, AI & CleanTech Support in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Alberta Innovation Grants & Funding  | + Energy Transition, AI & CleanTech Support?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $950M.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Stack Programs for Maximum Impact
expertTip.content: Alberta allows stacking multiple programs. Combine Alberta Innovates vouchers with ERA funding and federal SR&ED credits to maximize your non-dilutive capital.
